description: city and county seat of Seward County, Nebraska, United States
description_wiki: Seward is a city in and the county seat of Seward County, Nebraska, United States.

description: reserve force of the United States Army and Air Force
description_wiki: The National Guard is a military reserve organization of the United States Department of Defense (DoD).

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: census designated place in Texas, United States
description_wiki: Fort Bliss is a United States Army post in New Mexico and Texas, with its headquarters in El Paso, Texas.
Benton County is a county in the U.S. state of Iowa.
Raymond Alexander Kerr (born September 10, 1994) is an American professional baseball pitcher in the Atlanta Braves organization.

description: United States Army post outside Columbus, Georgia, previously known as Fort Moore
description_wiki: Fort Benning (formerly Fort Moore from 2023–25) is a United States Army post in the Columbus, Georgia, area.

description: city of Vietnam, capital of the Khánh Hòa Province
description_wiki: Nha Trang (English:  or ; Vietnamese: [ɲaː1 t͡ɕaːŋ1] ) is a coastal city and the former capital of Khánh Hòa Province, on the South Central Coast of Vietnam.

aliases: National Liberation Front for South Vietnam
National Front for the Liberation of South Vietnam
description: revolutionary organization active in South Vietnam and Cambodia from 1960 to 1977
description_wiki: The Viet Cong (VC) was an epithet and umbrella term to refer to the communist-led armed movement and united front organization in South Vietnam.

description: former country in Southeast Asia that existed from 1945 to 1976
description_wiki: The Democratic Republic of Vietnam (DRV; Vietnamese: Việt Nam Dân chủ Cộng hòa – VNDCCH), was a country in Southeast Asia from 1945 to 1976, with sovereignty recognized in July 1954, after which it became commonly known as North Vietnam.
David Fuller (born 4 September 1954) is an English convicted murderer and necrophile.

description: United States Armed Forces decoration award
description_wiki: The Bronze Star Medal (BSM) is a United States Armed Forces decoration awarded to members of the United States Armed Forces for either heroic achievement, heroic service, meritorious achievement, or meritorious service in a combat zone.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.
A Master of Business Administration (MBA) is a professional degree focused on business administration.
